#  We monetize african websites
Do you own one or more quality websites ? Focus on your audience and content, AfrikAd takes care of making them profitable to make you earn money online.
[Start here](https://www.afrikad.com/en/#solutions) [Register my website !](https://www.afrikad.com/en/registration)
## Our solutions
**AfrikAd is the specialist in digital advertisement in Africa.**
Your website is a media, a blog, a portal for real-estate, job or classified ads ?
* ### Increase your audience
Publish better content and features to attract more and more visitors.
* ### Allocate advertisement slots
... and that's all! AfrikAd will use its network of advertisers to display targeted banners and optimize your revenues.
* ### Earn money
Each month, follow your progress and cash your revenue.
##  **Are your interested by AfrikAd?**
Contact us to earn more money online,
it's free and without engagement.
[Contact us](https://www.afrikad.com/en/#contact)
[ ![](https://www.afrikad.com/assets/img/index/Afrikad-Monetize-your-website.jpg?v=1bc29b) ](https://www.afrikad.com/en/#contact)
## About us
### Why choose AfrikAd ?
**For truly targeted advertisements**
Our network of advertisers is african and categorized, so that the advertisements will be adapted to your visitors.
**For modern and user-respectful advertisement formats**
Other than classic display banner, we offer you innovative formats adapted to all devices.
**For the recognized seriousness of the Go Africa Online group**
You will work with one of the largest digital group of Africa, specialized in communication and web technology.
**For the opportunity to save time and earn more money**
A web project can only be perpetuated if it becomes profitable, but it's already a considerable work to create a successful website. We offer you to take care of its marketing.
**For the transparency and live follow-up of your income**
As an editor, you have access to a dedicated securized panel allowing you to follow you performance and your revenues.
